conversation_history.user: see yesterday i went out with frnds for trampoline park , and in the early morning i go to a temple with the girl i love (she likes me too she has said ) she even gave me a kiss. everything was going great until when returning back to clg . she literaly sat on someone else lap giving excuse of not having seat left
conversation_history.ai: Ouch, that's a bit of a bummer, Aarav! It sounds like she's not being very consistent with her feelings.

conversation_history.user: i confrented to her abt it
conversation_history.ai: Tough conversation, Aarav! How did she react?

conversation_history.user: she was just saying that it wasnt her fault , there was no space, she said she loves me only
conversation_history.ai: It sounds like she's trying to downplay the situation, Aarav. That's not very reassuring, is it?

conversation_history.user: exactly, you know what . even if i accept all what she said , this act has made a really deep impact on me at this point i have to rethink of loving her
conversation_history.ai: That's a tough realization, Aarav. It's okay to take a step back and reevaluate your feelings. Maybe take some time to focus on yourself and your own happiness.
That's still there, Aarav - the love you had for her. It might take time, but it's okay to let go and move on.

conversation_history.user: i gave her everything in my reach
conversation_history.ai: You poured your heart out to her, Aarav. That takes a lot of courage and vulnerability.
It's hard to let go of the pieces of yourself you gave to someone, Aarav.
It's okay to feel broken, Aarav. Just give yourself time to heal and pick up the pieces.

conversation_history.user: it will a lot of time again for me
